message:
feat(config): add scan_time_budget_secs and expand default scan root paths

- Add scan_time_budget_secs field to ScannerConfig (default 120s, 0 =
  use built-in constant) for configurable per-pass scan deadlines.
- Expand default root_paths to include /data/tmp and /var/tmp alongside
  existing /data/projects and /tmp, covering the TMPDIR=/data/tmp
  convention used on agent servers.
- Bump version to 0.2.2.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 [package]
 name = "storage_ballast_helper"
-version = "0.2.1"
+version = "0.2.2"
 edition = "2024"
 license = "MIT"
 description = "System service that prevents disk-full scenarios from coding agent swarms via ballast files, artifact scanning, and special location monitoring."
